printed.name: Tower Prep
printed.setup: Lying supine, arms straight and overhead, hands holding poles (close to Mat), legs straight and hip width apart, toes placed on PTBar and plantarflexed

movement.exhale: Roll up onto shoulder girdle, simultaneously bend legs and extend hips | Roll down, simutaneously straighten legs

cues: Keep arms straight and maintain scapular stabilization
Maintain hip extensor engagement when rolling up and down
